name: fluffos-lpc
description: LPC language support driven by the FluffOS compiler's own grammar contract: syntax highlighting, structural diagnostics, and optional real compiler errors via lpcc.

lpc.lint.enabled.description: Run the built-in structural lint (illegal characters, unterminated literals, unbalanced brackets, mismatched #if/#endif) as you type.

lpc.format.enabled.description: Enable the built-in LPC formatter for the Format Document command and format-on-save.

lpc.lpcc.path.description: Path to the FluffOS lpcc binary. When set (together with lpc.lpcc.configFile), the file is compiled on save and the compiler's real errors and warnings are shown.

lpc.lpcc.configFile.description: Driver config file passed to lpcc (e.g. /path/to/mud/etc/config).

lpc.mudlibRoot.description: Mudlib root directory; open files are passed to lpcc relative to it. Defaults to the file's workspace folder.
